authority: CIS-EX-008 proposed protocol; not authorized for collection

scope.population: population pending methods and accessibility review
scope.task: bounded target-operation discovery and recovery task

prohibited_interpretations: A rejected attempt does not establish misunderstanding, carelessness, or participant deficit.
measurand: count of valid selections rejected for capability, permission, or enablement before episode termination
observation_model: Each resolved selection is linked to the pre-action opportunity profile and typed execution result.
operationalization: Count selections with a resolved rejection result of capability absent, permission denied, or precondition unsatisfied; exclude instrument-invalid selections and report them separately.
coding_rules: Resolve the pre-action state and authority version before classifying.
Do not treat a hidden or unsignaled executable action as system-unavailable.
estimator: preregistered condition contrast for episode counts with exposure time or opportunity count declared
permissible_transformations: rate per declared opportunity count when preregistered
permissible_comparisons: condition contrast with identical target semantics and authority
permitted_interpretations: The count reports resolved selections rejected for one of the frozen system-availability predicates during a valid observation window.

uncertainty_budget.state_resolution: unresolved pre-action state invalidates the affected classification
uncertainty_budget.authority_resolution: unresolved authority invalidates the affected classification
uncertainty_budget.exposure: censored windows retain observed counts and explicit censoring status

reliability_evidence_requirements: replay reproduces state, authority, and typed rejection
validity_evidence_requirements: rejection types are distinguishable from transport and instrumentation failures

comparison_scope.population: reviewed and adequately supported study population
comparison_scope.task: frozen target-operation discovery and recovery task
comparison_scope.context: reviewed devices, instructions, training, and setting

missingness_rules.no_attempt: record observed zero only when the complete episode was validly observed
missingness_rules.abandonment: retain observed count and mark exposure as censored
